_instructions: Workday doesn't have a single guessable token like Greenhouse/Lever, so each
company below needs 3 values found by visiting their real careers page:
1. Go to the company's careers site (e.g. jobs.apple.com, or search
2. Open browser DevTools > Network tab, then search for any job on the site.
3. Look for a request URL that looks like:
4. Fill in the three parts below:
- host_suffix: the 'wdN' part (e.g. 'wd1', 'wd5' - varies per company)
- board: the career site name in the path (e.g. 'Apple', case-sensitive,
sometimes has spaces encoded as '%20' or dashes)
This file ships EMPTY on purpose - I can't verify Workday tenant IDs from here
(sandboxed, no internet access to myworkdayjobs.com), and guessing wrong values
would silently return zero results without you knowing why. Fill in 2-3 real
ones first, confirm scrape_workday.py finds postings, then expand from there.
